project_type: Next.js 14+ App Router dashboard application with TypeScript
build_system: npm with Next.js CLI, Prisma for database migrations
test_framework: Next.js built-in build validation, Prisma migrate for DB
test_command: npx prisma migrate deploy && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npx prisma generate to generate client. 3. Run npx prisma db push to create database. 4. Run npm run build to verify the project builds. 5. Optionally run npm run dev to test locally.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/dev.db (SQLite database file, generated by prisma db push). node_modules/.prisma/client (generated by prisma generate). .next/ (build output).
setup_instructions: 1. npm install 2. npx prisma generate 3. npx prisma db push 4. npx prisma db seed (for demo data) 5. npm run dev
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to npm registry. Node.js v22, npm 11.4.2 available. No Docker needed for this project.
contribution_requirements: Working on feat/si-admin-dashboard branch. All UI text in Bahasa Indonesia. Modern responsive design with shadcn/ui components.
key_patterns: Next.js App Router with app/ directory. Prisma ORM with SQLite. shadcn/ui component library. Tailwind CSS for styling. Server components by default, client components with 'use client' directive where needed.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages. src/app/(dashboard)/ - Dashboard layout group with sidebar. src/components/ - Reusable UI components. src/components/ui/ - shadcn/ui base components. src/lib/ - Utilities, Prisma client, helpers. prisma/ - Database schema and migrations.
